name: marketplace-tools
description: Meta-plugin for reviewing candidate contributions to the sten-ayunit marketplace. Skills: skill-review (audits a candidate SKILL.md against a target plugin's conventions AND live-checks references against the Ayunit MCP tool surface + docs); artifact-review (audits a candidate live-artifact HTML for Cowork bridge usage, MCP-tool existence, sibling consistency, and security hygiene). Both emit a structured VERDICT report (accept new / merge into sibling / reject) with actionable, line-referenced findings.
